global_rules: canonical appends and their projection changes share one database transaction per family
index switches use expected-current compare-and-swap when concurrency matters
no public HTTP endpoint directly invokes a generated-object write transaction

transactions.name: State Tick Commit
preconditions: semantic hashes and physical invariants verified
transactions.atomicity: One Postgres transaction; any failure rolls back every append and projection or index update.
failure_semantics: no posterior without transition and assimilation update
no checkpoint advance without terminal tick
no index points to missing fact
transactions.idempotency: same tick key and determinism hashes returns the existing record set; conflicting hash fails

transactions.name: Scenario Commit
transactions.atomicity: One Postgres transaction; Scenario failure does not roll back the source State Tick.
failure_semantics: failed Scenario is not promoted to latest successful Scenario
transactions.idempotency: same Scenario-set key and hash returns existing set; conflict fails

transactions.name: Forecast Residual Commit
preconditions: active or superseded lineage selection is explicit
transactions.atomicity: Residual fact and projection or trace update commit together.
transactions.idempotency: Forecast-point plus observation plus matching-rule-version identity

transactions.name: Model Governance Step Commit
transactions.owner: Config, Calibration, Shadow, or Activation service according to object writer matrix
preconditions: activation has approval and an effective tick boundary
canonical_appends: one of twin_runtime_config_v1, twin_calibration_candidate_v1, twin_shadow_evaluation_v1, twin_model_activation_v1
projection_writes: active config index CAS only for activation
transactions.atomicity: Each governance transition is independently append-only; Candidate, Shadow, Approval, and Activation are not collapsed into one transaction.
failure_semantics: failed Activation leaves active binding unchanged
transactions.idempotency: transition-specific key and hash; Activation conflict fails

transactions.name: Revision Promotion Commit
preconditions: candidate lineage complete through current checkpoint
candidate checkpoint and latest object refs exist
transactions.atomicity: Promotion fact and every active or latest pointer switch commit in one Postgres transaction.
failure_semantics: candidate lineage remains queryable but inactive
readers never see mixed parent and candidate latest pointers
transactions.idempotency: candidate-lineage promotion key and hash; conflicting active parent fails

transactions.name: Operational Attempt and Health Commit
preconditions: attempt terminal or material health transition
transactions.atomicity: Attempt audit and health snapshot or latest update commit together; lease heartbeat may remain a separate short operational update.
failure_semantics: no posterior, terminal tick, or checkpoint appends
BLOCKED, FAILED, and RECOVERING remain operational
transactions.idempotency: attempt event identity plus semantic hash

transactions.name: Human Decision Link Commit
transactions.atomicity: Decision link and its read projection commit together; Approval remains separate.
failure_semantics: no Approval, Plan, or Task is inferred
transactions.idempotency: human decision request id plus semantic hash

transactions.name: Action Feedback Commit
preconditions: governed task, receipt, as-executed, and acceptance refs resolved
executed amount, timing, and coverage distinguished from planned values
transactions.atomicity: Normalized feedback fact and read or Evidence indexes commit together.
failure_semantics: untrusted or incomplete execution Evidence is rejected or explicitly limited
active model and past State remain unchanged
transactions.idempotency: source executed-Evidence identity plus normalization version and hash
